gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (56/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (56/ 4)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أَرْجُو أَنْ تَكُونَ صَاحِبَ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ أَنْ يَسُوقَهُ اللَّهُ إِلَيْكَ بِغَيْرِ سَيْفٍ فَقَدْ بُويِعَ لَكَ وَ ضُرِبَتِ الدَّرَاهِمُ بِاسْمِكَ

فَقَالَ مَا مِنَّا أَحَدٌ اخْتَلَفَتْ إِلَيْهِ الْكُتُبُ وَ أُشِيرَ إِلَيْهِ بِالْأَصَابِعِ وَ سُئِلَ عَنِ الْمَسَائِلِ وَ حُمِلَتْ إِلَيْهِ الْأَمْوَالُ إِلَّا اغْتِيلَ أَوْ مَاتَ عَلَى فِرَاشِهِ حَتَّى يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ لِهَذَا الْأَمْرِ غُلَاماً مِنَّا خَفِيَّ الْوِلَادَةِ وَ الْمَنْشَإِ غَيْرَ خَفِيٍّ فِي نَسَبِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sa’ad Bin Abdullah, from Ayoub Bin Nuh who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I am hoping that you<sup>asws</sup> would happen to be the Master<sup>asws</sup> of this command and that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Usher it to You<sup>asws</sup> without (having raised) a sword, for allegiance has been pledged to you<sup>asws</sup> and the Dirham has been struck with your<sup>asws</sup> name (on it)’.

So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is none from us<sup>asws</sup> with whom letters have been exchanged and he<sup>asws</sup> has been pointed to with the fingers, and asked about the questioned, and the wealth has been carried over to him<sup>asws</sup>, except that he<sup>asws</sup> has been assassinated or passed away upon his<sup>asws</sup> bed, until Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Would Send for this command, a boy from us<sup>asws</sup>, concealed of the birth and the growth, without there being a concealment with regards to his<sup>asws</sup> lineage’.
en.sarwar: 25. A number of our people has narrated from Sa‘d ibn ‘Abdallah from Ayyub ibn Nuh who has said the following. “I said to abu al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.), ’Isma‘il hope that you will become the inchrge of this task (Leadership with Divine Authority). Allah will drive it to your control with the sword now that the pledge of allegiance is offered to you and currency coins are printed in your name.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “There has been no one from us with whom letters had been exchanged, being pointed out with the gesture of fingers, questions asked and properties delivered to him but that he was murdered or died in his bed. (It will be as such) until Allah will raise for this task (Leadership with Divine Authority) a young boy from us whose birth place and upbringing would be unknown (to people) but not his ancestors.”
